title: Select CityWalk is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Select CityWalk is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
